name: Serverless.Cors

unions.name: Reflectable
unions.comment:
A reflectable header value.

A reflectable value can either be

  - `ReflectRequest` derive the headers from the request
  - `Exactly` set to a specific value

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment: Specify all CORS configuration in one record.
aliases.type: { origin : Reflectable (List String), expose : List String, maxAge : Int, credentials : Bool, methods : List Method, headers : Reflectable (List String) }

values.name: allowCredentials
values.comment:
Sets `access-control-allow-credentials`.

Only sets the header if the value is `True`.
values.type: Bool -> Conn config model route interop -> Conn config model route interop

values.name: allowHeaders
values.comment:
Sets `access-control-allow-headers`.

`ReflectRequest` will reflect the request `access-control-request-headers` headers
or if absent, it will not set the header at all.
values.type: Reflectable (List String) -> Conn config model route interop -> Conn config model route interop

values.name: allowMethods
values.type: List Method -> Conn config model route interop -> Conn config model route interop

values.name: allowOrigin
values.comment:
Sets `access-control-allow-origin`.

`ReflectRequest` will reflect the request `origin` header, or if absent, will
just be set to `*`
values.type: Reflectable (List String) -> Conn config model route interop -> Conn config model route interop

values.name: cors
values.type: Config -> Conn config model route interop -> Conn config model route interop

values.name: exposeHeaders
values.type: List String -> Conn config model route interop -> Conn config model route interop

values.name: fromConfig
values.comment:
Set CORS headers according to a configuration record.

This function is best used when the configuration is provided externally and
decoded using `configDecoder`. For example, npm rc and AWS Lambda environment
variables can be used as the source of CORS configuration.
values.type: (config -> Config) -> Conn config model route interop -> Conn config model route interop

values.name: maxAge
values.comment:
Sets `access-control-max-age`.

If the value is not positive, the header will not be set.
values.type: Int -> Conn config model route interop -> Conn config model route interop

values.name: methodsDecoder
values.comment: Case-insensitive decode a list of HTTP methods.

values.name: reflectableDecoder
values.comment:
Decode a reflectable value from JSON.

  - `"*"` decodes to `ReflectRequest`
  - `"foo,bar"` or `["foo", "bar"]` decodes to `Exactly ["foo", "bar"]`
